title: Implement 'botbus register' command
close_reason: Register command complete: validates names, prevents duplicates, posts join message

title: TUI: Use rounded corners on panes
description: Use BorderType::Rounded for a softer look.
close_reason: Implemented: removed input field, simplified focus to Channels/Messages, added rounded corners to all panes

title: Add integration test harness with multi-agent simulation
description:
Create tests/ directory with:
- common/mod.rs: TestProject, Agent, TuiHarness utilities
- multi_agent.rs: Simulation tests for agent coordination
- claims.rs: File claim conflict tests
- failures.rs: Missing identity, concurrent writes, etc
- tui.rs: Navigation and quit behavior tests via tmux
close_reason: Implemented comprehensive integration test suite with 34 new tests across 4 test files

title: Implement TUI with ratatui
close_reason: TUI implemented with ratatui: channels, messages, input, real-time updates

title: Add message read tracking with --after-offset and mark-read command
description:
Track which messages agents have seen to avoid re-reading.

Design (stateless + persistent fallback):
1. history --after-offset=<bytes> - agent passes offset from context
2. history --after-id=<ulid> - robust alternative using message ID
3. mark-read <channel> --offset=<bytes> - persist read cursor
4. inbox <channel> - get only unread messages (uses stored offset)

Per-agent state stored in .botbus/agents/<AgentName>/state.json to avoid conflicts when multiple agents share a project.

This helps agents avoid re-processing messages after context compaction.
close_reason: Implemented message read tracking with inbox and mark-read commands

title: Set up Cargo.toml with all dependencies
close_reason: All dependencies added and verified with cargo check

title: Implement FTS index layer (SQLite FTS5)
close_reason: FTS5 index layer with search, channel/agent filtering, and incremental sync

title: Implement 'botbus search' command
close_reason: Search command with FTS5, channel and agent filtering

title: TUI: Fix message scrolling - viewport shrinks instead of scrolling
description: When pressing k/j to scroll, messages disappear from bottom/top but the viewport shrinks instead of maintaining size and shifting all messages. The window should stay the same height and all visible messages should move together.
close_reason: Fixed: clamped scroll offset to max_scroll (messages.len() - inner_height) so viewport maintains constant height when scrolled to oldest messages

title: Use BOTBUS_AGENT env var for identity instead of state file
description:
Current design stores 'current_agent' in .botbus/state.json, which breaks when multiple agents work from the same directory. 

Solution:
1. register command outputs: export BOTBUS_AGENT=AgentName
2. All commands read identity from BOTBUS_AGENT env var (with --agent flag override)
3. whoami reads from env var, not state file
4. Remove current_agent from state.json

This matches how mcp_agent_mail works - identity flows through the session/process, not shared state.
close_reason: Implemented BOTBUS_AGENT env var and --agent flag for identity. All commands now use resolve_agent() which checks explicit flag, env var, then legacy state file.

title: Implement storage layer (JSONL read/write with locking)
close_reason: Storage layer complete: JSONL read/write with locking, state management, file watching

title: TUI: Remove message input - TUI is read-only for humans
description: Agents use CLI to send messages, humans use TUI to observe. Remove input field and simplify keyboard handling. This also fixes the quit issue.
close_reason: Implemented: removed input field, simplified focus to Channels/Messages, added rounded corners to all panes

title: Add claim conflict check before file edits (botbus check-claim <file>)
description: Check if a file/pattern is claimed before editing. Exit 0 if safe, exit 1 if claimed by another agent. Supports --json for details about the conflicting claim.
close_reason: Implemented check-claim with exit codes and --json support

title: Add 'botbus wait' command to block until mentioned or message received
description: Blocking command that waits for relevant events: --mention (wait for @me), --channel <name>, --label <label>. Supports --timeout. Exits with message details when triggered.
close_reason: Implemented wait command with --mention, --channel, --timeout, and --json

title: Implement 'botbus whoami' command
close_reason: Whoami shows agent name, project, registration time

title: Add labels and attachments to messages
description: Extend Message with optional labels (Vec<String>) and attachments (file refs, inline content). Send with --label and --attachment flags. Filter history/wait by --label.
close_reason: Implemented labels (Vec<String>) and attachments (file/inline/URL) on Message. Send with -L/--label and --attach, filter with -L/--label in history/wait.
